<mxCell id="47" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;" value="<div>9. <br>- Decode base64 assertion</div>- Check Signature with IdP public key&nbsp;<div>- Decode assertion if encrypted&nbsp;<br>- Check Issuer&nbsp;</div><div>- Check Destination (ACS url)</div><div>- Check Conditions and Audience</div><div>- Check InResponseTo (replay attacks) is the same as ID</div><div><br></div><div>- After those verifications, the Service Provider can trust the assertion:&nbsp;</div><div>- NameID contains the main username as furnished by the IdP.</div><div>- AttributeStatement contains others attributes used to enrich the user profiles, take some authorization decisions</div><div><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.div:
5.
- check Version
- check Signature with the SP public key if there is
- check Issuer
- check Destination
- check ACS url
- check ID (needs to be unique)

generate a SAML response

div.div:
2. Generate a SAML request
Save :
- ID
- RelayState sp/protected/myresource
- Issuer
- Destination

div.div:
9.
- Decode base64 assertion- Check Signature with IdP public key
- Decode assertion if encrypted
- Check Issuer
- Check Destination (ACS url)
- Check Conditions and Audience
- Check InResponseTo (replay attacks) is the same as ID
- After those verifications, the Service Provider can trust the assertion:
- NameID contains the main username as furnished by the IdP.
- AttributeStatement contains others attributes used to enrich the user profiles, take some authorization decisions
